meta.title: Sourcing Agent in India | AWSOverseas
meta.description: AWSOverseas is your trusted sourcing agent in India — we source, verify, and inspect products from vetted Indian manufacturers so you can import with confidence.

hero.title: Your Trusted Sourcing Agent
hero.subtitle: AWSOverseas works as your local partner to source the best quality products from India as per your requirements and specifications. Let us handle the complexity while you focus on growing your business.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: As a sourcing agent based in India, AWSOverseas are experts in fulfillment of your shipping and delivery needs with uncompromising quality at every stage.

steps.title: Tell Us Your Requirements
steps.description: Share your product specifications and requirements with us.

steps.title: We Source & Verify
steps.description: We identify and verify the best manufacturers for your needs.

steps.title: Quality Inspection
steps.description: Thorough quality checks ensure you get the best products.

steps.title: Smooth Shipping
steps.description: We handle all shipping and ensure timely delivery.

steps.title: Complete Support
steps.description: We stay with you throughout the entire process and beyond.

benefits.title: What Is Your Benefit
benefits.subtitle: Partnering with AWSOverseas means getting access to India's best manufacturers and products with complete support and transparency.

items.title: Cost Savings
items.description: We cut out the middlemen to bring you competitive market prices.

items.title: Quality Products & Services
items.description: We source from vetted and reliable suppliers, ensuring top quality products & services.

items.title: Save Time
items.description: We do all the leg work and give you a detailed list of potential suppliers and manufacturers with the best price and quality.

items.title: Reduced Risks
items.description: Based in India, we give you physical presence in key locations of manufacturing.

items.title: Reliable Services
items.description: In-depth knowledge of the product, language, and culture of the market that helps maintain quality.

items.title: Expert Guidance
items.description: You get a reliable trading partner of your choice in the industry.
